status_note_md.en: The Federal Foreign Office presents the Opportunity Card as an active residence route that lets third-country skilled workers enter Germany to seek employment. Online application is available through the official Consular Services portal.
status_note_md.zh-Hans: 德国外交部将机会卡列为现行居留途径，允许第三国技术工人进入德国求职。可通过官方领事服务门户在线申请。

summary_md.en: A German job-search residence route for non-EU skilled workers. It is designed to help candidates look for qualified employment in Germany, typically for up to one year, with limited part-time work while searching. Finding a qualifying job can lead to a longer work residence title such as the EU Blue Card.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 面向非欧盟技术工人的德国求职居留途径。旨在帮助申请人在德国寻找合格工作，通常最长一年，求职期间可从事有限兼职。找到合资格工作后可转为欧盟蓝卡等更长期工作居留。

good_for_md.en: Skilled workers from outside the EU who want time in Germany to find a job, either with a recognised qualification or through the points-based Opportunity Card selection rules, and who can support themselves during the search.
good_for_md.zh-Hans: 适合希望在德国求职的非欧盟技术工人，无论是通过获认可资格还是机会卡积分规则，并能够在求职期间自给。

not_good_for_md.en: People who already have a qualifying job offer (other work routes may fit better), applicants seeking unrestricted remote-only work for foreign employers only, or a dedicated digital-nomad visa. Germany does not have a dedicated digital-nomad visa in this record.
not_good_for_md.zh-Hans: 不适合已有合资格工作机会（其他工作途径可能更合适）、仅寻求为境外雇主远程工作，或寻求专门数字游民签证的申请人。本记录不将德国描述为提供专门数字游民签证。

note_md.en: The Opportunity Card is aimed at skilled workers. Applicants may qualify with a recognised foreign vocational or higher-education qualification, or via a points system that scores education, experience, language, age and related factors. Exact scoring and recognition rules should be checked on the official self-check and portal.
note_md.zh-Hans: 机会卡面向技术工人。申请人可凭获认可的境外职业或高等教育资格，或通过评估学历、经验、语言、年龄等因素的积分制获得资格。具体计分与认证规则应在官方自检工具和门户核对。

note_md.en: Work experience can improve points under the selection system when that route is used. Official materials emphasise skilled-worker profiles rather than unskilled labour.
note_md.zh-Hans: 在适用积分途径时，工作经验可提高分数。官方材料强调技术工人画像，而非非技术劳动。

language.test: German or English language evidence under Opportunity Card rules

note_md.en: Language ability is part of the Opportunity Card points assessment. Exact minimum levels depend on the current official scoring table.
note_md.zh-Hans: 语言能力属于机会卡积分评估的一部分。具体最低等级取决于当前官方计分表。

stability_requirement_md.en: Applicants must be able to support themselves during the job search. Official guidance commonly refers to blocked-account or other subsistence proof rather than a job salary threshold for entry.
stability_requirement_md.zh-Hans: 申请人必须能在求职期间自给。官方指引通常要求冻结账户或其他生活费证明，而非入职时的薪资门槛。

application_processing_time_md.en: Processing depends on the mission or authority handling the application. The card is typically issued for up to one year for job search; after finding qualified work, a different residence title is needed.
application_processing_time_md.zh-Hans: 处理时间取决于办理申请的使领馆或主管机关。该卡通常为最长一年的求职居留；找到合格工作后需换取其他居留许可。

summary_md.en: The Opportunity Card itself is a temporary job-search title. A later skilled-work residence permit such as the EU Blue Card may lead toward permanent residence under its own rules.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 机会卡本身是临时求职身份。之后如欧盟蓝卡等技术工作居留许可，可在其自身规则下通向永久居留。

summary_md.en: The Opportunity Card sources do not establish citizenship eligibility.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 机会卡来源没有确认公民资格。

rationale_md.en: The route is officially active, but Make it in Germany pages are often bot-protected and detailed points thresholds change. Human review of the current portal and mission instructions is required before applying.
rationale_md.zh-Hans: 该途径官方有效，但 Make it in Germany 页面常受机器人防护，详细积分门槛会变化。申请前需人工核对当前门户和使领馆说明。

/income.section: No job offer required to enter for search

/family.section: Family rules not fully established on portal landing

/pr_pathway.section: Temporary search title leading to later work permit

changelog.summary: Added Germany Opportunity Card coverage from Federal Foreign Office portal evidence.
